mapper.sql: p.proposal_id, p.company_email, p.freelancer_email, p.recruitment_id, r.title AS recruitment_title, r.budget, r.work_location, r.contract_start_at, r.contract_end_at, p.status, p.sent_at, p.contract_id, p.chat_room_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM proposal p INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = p.recruitment_id WHERE p.freelancer_email = #{email} ORDER BY p.sent_at DESC, p.proposal_id DESC
SELECT FROM proposal p INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = p.recruitment_id WHERE p.company_email = #{email} ORDER BY p.sent_at DESC, p.proposal_id DESC
SELECT FROM proposal p INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = p.recruitment_id WHERE p.proposal_id = #{proposalId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO proposal ( company_email, freelancer_email, recruitment_id, status, sent_at ) VALUES ( #{companyEmail}, #{freelancerEmail}, #{recruitmentId}, #{status}, NOW() )
